title: Kaajal
writer: Phani Majumdar, Gulshan Nanda, Kidar Nath Sharma
plot: The Munim (Clerk) in Ranimaa's family lives with his son, Kaushal and daughter, Madhavi. After he passes away, Ranimaa brings up both children as her own, along with her only son, Rajesh. Years later, Rajesh has grown up and is of...
